steps.title: Translate and equate the two relationships
steps.content:
$a$ is 280% of $b$ gives $a = 2.8b$. $a$ is 85% of $c$ gives $a = 0.85c$.

Setting these equal:
$$2.8b = 0.85c$$

steps.title: Solve for c as a percentage of b
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 0.85:
$$c = \frac{2.8}{0.85}b = \frac{56}{17}b$$
Express as a percentage by multiplying by 100:
$$p = \frac{56}{17} \times 100 = \frac{5600}{17} \approx 329.41$$
The closest value is 329. That confirms D is correct.
